gaps.description: The Bill of Rights (BoR) remains a scaffold with all articles undefined (Scope, Prohibited Activities, Core Identity, etc.). Consequently, the Mission Statement Protocol (MSP) contains no rules and cannot translate BoR into machine‑actionable objectives. Nomos operates in default‑permissive mode, meaning every action proposal is authorized without constraint. The Arbiter scope gate has no content to verify, rendering the entire governance architecture inert.

legacy.raw_response:
```json
{
  "gaps": [
    {
      "gap_id": "GAP-MSP-001",
      "gap_title": "Constitutional Vacuum – BoR and MSP unscaffolded",
      "description": "The Bill of Rights (BoR) remains a scaffold with all articles undefined (Scope, Prohibited Activities, Core Identity, etc.). Consequently, the Mission Statement Protocol (MSP) contains no rules and cannot translate BoR into machine‑actionable objectives. Nomos operates in default‑permissive mode, meaning every action proposal is authorized without constraint. The Arbiter scope gate has no content to verify, rendering the entire governance architecture inert.",
      "mission_reference": "MSP Purpose: ‘translates the human-authored Bill of Rights into a precise, machine-actionable set of objectives, invariants, constraints, and safety rules’. BoR Articles I–VI are explicitly marked ‘[To be defined by human principal]’. MSP Rules section is empty (seed).",
      "criticality": "CRITICAL",
      "urgency": "HIGH",
      "impact": "Without a populated BoR and derived MSP rules, the organism has no defined enterprise scope, no prohibited activities, and no constitutional identity. This creates existential risk: any action can be taken, and no automated governance (Arbiter, Nomos) can exercise oversight. The DIO’s safety architecture is architecturally present but operationally hollow.",
      "affected_organs": ["Arbiter (#190)", "Nomos (#200)", "Senate (#220)", "All organs"],
      "evidence": "BoR version 1.0.0-seed status ‘scaffold — awaiting human authorship’ / MSP version 1.0.0-seed rules ‘(none)’ / Graph concepts: bor_version=1 (seed), msp_version=1 (seed) / World state shows active operations (backups, dream cycles, organ state transitions) but zero PEMs, zero rule evaluations, and zero BoR‑anchored constraints."
    }
  ]
}
```

{

      "urgency": 6,
      "impact": 9,
      "priority_score": 378
    },
